title: Sales Force Integration with monday.com
excerpt: I am inquiring whether it is possible to set up an integration between Salesforce and Monday.com. Specifically, I would like Monday.com to fetch images from Salesforce listings and save them on Monday.com, associating ea…

posts.author: Shoaibali450 (Shoaib Ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am inquiring whether it is possible to set up an integration between Salesforce and Monday.com. Specifically, I would like Monday.com to fetch images from Salesforce listings and save them on Monday.com, associating each image with its respective reference.
Is it possible to get this done natively?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it is possible to set up an integration between Salesforce and Monday.com using Make. You can create a scenario that fetches images from Salesforce listings and saves them on Monday.com, associating each image with its respective reference.
